rows.description: Mar 11 Rec? The Treasury Share of Medenhans Fine being the 4th Part of 3t. 6-8
rows.notes: Values (9 11 8) are consistent between both extractors. Description from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('Treasury', 'Medenhans', '3t. 6-8'). gpt-5-mini's note about combining lines and ink blurs was informative but its description was less accurate.

rows.english_description_with_amount: The treasury's share of the Medenhans fine (one quarter), amounting to £9 11s 8d.

rows.description: Ap 13 Rec? Jm. Ballard's 2d Payment of Jn Shortridges Benef. for 1768 due Mich 1768
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identifies the full description and the associated amount (100 0 0) for this line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted a partial description and no amount for its R9, then assigned the 100 0 0 to a mis-parsed R10. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash is accurate.
rows.english_description: Second payment by James Ballard toward John Shortridge's benefaction for 1768, which was due at Michaelmas 1768.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second payment by James Ballard toward John Shortridge's benefaction for 1768, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: Ap 15 Mr. Jackson's account for the Merton Estate for the Year from Mich. 1769 to Mich 1768 due at Mich. 1768
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identifies this line as a descriptive entry with no monetary amount on the line itself. gpt-5-mini mis-segmented the preceding lines and did not correctly represent this row's content, so it is considered a 'missing row' in gpt-5-mini's perspective for this exact content.
rows.english_description: Mr Jackson's account for the Merton estate for the year to Michaelmas (account recorded; amount not shown).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account for the Merton estate for the year to Michaelmas (amount not recorded).

rows.notes: gemini-flash's amount (£263) is visually correct. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds as 265. Visual verification confirms the '3' digit.
Both extractors agree on the description and values (6 2 3).
rows.english_description: Corn rent (rent paid or valued in corn).

rows.notes: Both extractors agree on the description and values (271 2 3). Although the arithmetic sum of the preceding two entries (Money Rent and Corn Rent) would be £269 2s 3d based on the correct 'Money Rent' value, the ledger clearly shows '271' for the pounds here. The row type 'total' is correct.

rows.description: Allowed a Years Land. tax at 3s. pd. Pound from Lady Day 1769 to L.Day 1768
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identifies this line as a descriptive entry with no monetary amount on the line itself, noting that the amount follows. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the amount (24 17 3) to this line. Visual verification confirms no amount on this line.
rows.english_description: Allowance recorded for a year's land tax at 3s per pound covering the year from Lady Day 1768 to Lady Day 1769.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance for a year's land tax at 3s per pound (amount recorded on the following line).

rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identifies this line as a distinct entry containing only the amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this amount with the preceding descriptive line, thus 'missing' this row as a separate entry.
rows.english_description: Monetary amount of the land tax allowance for the year from Lady Day 1768 to Lady Day 1769.
